Make your meal planning easy and your money go further with our bulk packs of chicken breast fillets. Sourced from only carefully selected producers, these quality 100% chicken breast fillets are skinless, boneless and have no added water. Low in fat and high in protein, they are ideal for those who enjoy healthy eating whilst also making healthy savings.

Our halal mutton/lamb chops are a delicious and tender cut of meat, perfect for grilling or roasting. Cut from the loin of the lamb, these front chops are lean and flavorful. They are best cooked quickly at a high heat to seal in their natural juices, resulting in a juicy and succulent chop. With a delicate, mild flavor and a tender texture, these lamb chops are sure to be a hit with the whole family. Simply season them with your favorite herbs and spices and cook to your desired level of doneness. Order today and enjoy the taste of these high-quality halal lamb chops!

Our mutton leg meat diced is the perfect ingredient for a hearty and flavorful meal. Cut from the leg of the lamb, this meat is tender and succulent. It is perfect for stews, casseroles, and slow-cooked dishes, as it becomes more tender the longer it is cooked.

Mutton Meat (Diced) BONELESS from Mutton Leg & Shoulder Cuts Only
Our mutton meat boneless diced is a delicious and convenient option for any home cook. Cut from the leg of the lamb, this meat is tender and flavorful. It is perfect for a variety of dishes, such as stews, roasts, and kebabs. The boneless cut makes it easy to dice and slice, so you can use it in any recipe. Simply add it to your favorite dish and let the rich, savory flavor of the mutton shine through. Order today and add this versatile meat to your culinary repertoire!

Mutton Minced Meat (25% Fat Only)
Our mutton mince meat is a delicious and versatile ingredient for any home cook. Made from the leanest cuts of mutton, this mince is perfect for a variety of dishes such as meatballs, burgers, and pasta sauces. Its finely ground texture makes it easy to mix and shape, so you can use it in a variety of recipes. Order today and experience the delicious taste of our high-quality mutton mince!

Our Mutton Meat Mixed with chops is a delicious and convenient choice for any meat lover. This package includes a variety of cuts, including tender chops that are perfect for grilling or roasting. The mixed meat is sourced from farms that adhere to the highest standards of quality and animal welfare, ensuring that you are getting the best possible product. Mutton has a rich, full flavor that pairs well with a variety of seasonings and marinades. Whether you’re looking for an easy dinner option or planning a special meal, this mutton mixed meat with chops is sure to be a hit. Order now and enjoy the taste and convenience of this high-quality meat.

Our mutton shoulder meat diced is the perfect ingredient for a hearty and flavorful meal. Cut from the shoulder of the lamb, this meat is tender and succulent. It is perfect for stews, casseroles, and slow-cooked dishes, as it becomes more tender the longer it is cooked.
